# CWE-611: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-611-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/xml"
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: rejects DOCTYPE and keeps Strict parsing on trusted-size payloads.
func ImportCatalog(c *gin.Context) {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(io.LimitReader(c.Request.Body, 1<<20))
	if err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if bytes.Contains(bytes.ToUpper(body), []byte("<!DOCTYPE")) {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "DOCTYPE not allowed")
		return
	}
	dec := xml.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(body))
	dec.Strict = true
	var catalog struct {
		XMLName xml.Name `xml:"catalog"`
		Item    string   `xml:"item"`
	}
	if err := dec.Decode(&catalog); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid catalog")
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"item": catalog.Item})
}
